channel_names.description: For multi-channel per-vertex attributes, the channel labels.

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

Axis.description: One axis of the spatial index.  Mirrors the OME-Zarr NGFF axis object (RFC 4/5).
Axis.title: Axis

BoundingBox.description: Two parallel ``ndim``-length arrays representing the global ``(min_corner, max_corner)`` of the store's vertices.  Stored on disk as ``[[min...], [max...]]``; modelled here as a class so cross-field rules can require matching dimensionality.
BoundingBox.title: BoundingBox

CRS.description: Free-form coordinate reference system metadata.  Modelled as an open dict because real-world CRS payloads come from many vocabularies (WKT, PROJ4, EPSG, CF conventions, ...) and we don't want to force a single one.  Generators that consume this schema should emit ``additionalProperties: true`` or equivalent.
CRS.title: CRS

CrossChunkLinkAttributeMeta.description: ``.zattrs`` for each ``cross_chunk_link_attributes/<name>/<delta>/`` array.  Stored as a flat blob parallel to the ``data`` blob of the matching ``cross_chunk_links/<delta>/`` array; ``num_links`` MUST equal the parallel CCL array's ``num_links``.

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

level_delta.description: Pyramid-level delta between the source side (the level that owns this array) and the target side of the edges.  ``0`` for intra-level arrays (the only kind written pre-0.4), ``+N`` for edges from this level to ``this_level + N`` (coarser), ``-N`` for edges to ``this_level - N`` (finer).

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

CrossChunkLinkAttributeMeta.title: CrossChunkLinkAttributeMeta

CrossChunkLinksMeta.description: ``.zattrs`` for a ``cross_chunk_links/<delta>/`` array.  Each delta segment carries its own meta block; ``level_delta=0`` is the intra-level array.  Each record is ``link_width`` ``(chunk_coords, vertex_idx)`` endpoints — ``link_width=2`` encodes a cross-chunk edge, ``link_width=3`` a triangle face record, and so on.  Source-side endpoint (endpoint 0) lives at the array's own resolution level; target-side endpoints live at ``this_level + level_delta``.

level_delta.description: Pyramid-level delta between the source side (the level that owns this array) and the target side of the edges.  ``0`` for intra-level arrays (the only kind written pre-0.4), ``+N`` for edges from this level to ``this_level + N`` (coarser), ``-N`` for edges to ``this_level - N`` (finer).

link_width.description: Width of a links row (1 for parent→child metanode references, 2 for edges, 3 for triangle faces, 4 for quads).

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

CrossChunkLinksMeta.title: CrossChunkLinksMeta

CrossChunkStrategy.description: How connectivity that crosses chunk boundaries is represented.
CrossChunkStrategy.title: CrossChunkStrategy

CrossLevelStorage.description: How cross-pyramid-level edges are stored in the multiscale links layout (``links/<delta>/`` and ``cross_chunk_links/<delta>/``).
CrossLevelStorage.title: CrossLevelStorage

FormatCapability.description: Optional feature tokens a store advertises in :attr:`RootMetadata.format_capabilities`.  Open-set: new tokens will be added in future spec revisions; readers must tolerate unknown values.
FormatCapability.title: FormatCapability

GeometryType.description: The kind of geometry a store (or one of its sub-types) holds.
GeometryType.title: GeometryType

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

shape.description: Shape of a dense per-object/per-group array.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.
Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

LevelMetadata.description: Per-resolution-level ``.zattrs`` payload, persisted under the key ``zarr_vectors_level``.  Validates the runtime :class:`zarr_vectors.core.metadata.LevelMetadata` dataclass.

arrays_present.description: Names of arrays present in the level group.

bin_ratio.description: Integer fold-change per axis relative to level 0.

bin_shape.description: Per-axis supervoxel edge lengths at this level.  Must be ``None`` for level 0 (inherits ``base_bin_shape``); must be set for level > 0.

chunk_attribute_name.description: Name of the per-vertex attribute used as the leading chunk axis.

chunk_attribute_values.description: Ordered list mapping attribute-bin index to original attribute value.  Must be non-empty when set, and coherent with ``chunk_attribute_name`` (both set or both absent).

chunk_dims.description: Chunk-key axis names; the leading axis names appear first.  Set when the level uses attribute chunking (e.g. ``["gene", "z", "y", "x"]``).

inherited_num_objects.description: OID-space size inherited from the parent level (= ``parent_level.num_objects``).  Required when ``preserves_object_ids`` is true; absent on standalone levels.

object_sparsity.description: Fraction of objects retained at this level.

preserves_object_ids.description: True for levels written by the per-object pyramid regime.  When set, ``num_objects`` and ``object_attributes`` row count inherit from the parent level's OID space; dropped objects leave empty manifest slots and zero ``present_mask`` bytes.  ``parent_level`` is load-bearing under this flag.

shared_vertex_groups.description: True when per-chunk vertex groups may be referenced by multiple objects' manifests (shared metavertices in the per-object pyramid regime).  Readers MAY use this to short-circuit dedup work.

vertex_count.description: Total number of vertices at this level.

LevelMetadata.title: LevelMetadata

LinkAttributeMeta.description: ``.zattrs`` for each ``link_attributes/<name>/<delta>/`` array. Parallel to the ``links/<delta>/`` array of the same ``<delta>``.

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

level_delta.description: Pyramid-level delta between the source side (the level that owns this array) and the target side of the edges.  ``0`` for intra-level arrays (the only kind written pre-0.4), ``+N`` for edges from this level to ``this_level + N`` (coarser), ``-N`` for edges to ``this_level - N`` (finer).

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

LinkAttributeMeta.title: LinkAttributeMeta

LinksConvention.description: How intra-chunk links are represented for a polyline/graph/mesh.
LinksConvention.title: LinksConvention

LinksMeta.description: ``.zattrs`` for a ``links/<delta>/`` array.  Under the 0.4 multiscale layout, each delta segment carries its own meta block; ``level_delta=0`` is the intra-level array (the only one written pre-0.4).

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

level_delta.description: Pyramid-level delta between the source side (the level that owns this array) and the target side of the edges.  ``0`` for intra-level arrays (the only kind written pre-0.4), ``+N`` for edges from this level to ``this_level + N`` (coarser), ``-N`` for edges to ``this_level - N`` (finer).

link_width.description: Width of a links row (1 for parent→child metanode references, 2 for edges, 3 for triangle faces, 4 for quads).

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

LinksMeta.title: LinksMeta

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

shape.description: Shape of a dense per-object/per-group array.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

ObjectIndexConvention.description: How the object_id → vertex-group mapping is encoded.
ObjectIndexConvention.title: ObjectIndexConvention

num_objects.description: Total object count this array carries.

sid_ndim.description: Number of spatial-index dimensions encoded in chunk keys.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

RootMetadata.description: Root-level ``.zattrs`` payload, persisted under the key ``zarr_vectors``.  Validates the runtime :class:`zarr_vectors.core.metadata.RootMetadata` dataclass. Note: the canonical axis list lives in ``multiscales[0].axes`` at root level (NGFF-style), NOT under ``zarr_vectors`` — see ``MultiscalesMetadata``.

base_bin_shape.description: Supervoxel bin edge lengths at level 0.  When set, every value must be > 0 and ``chunk_shape`` must be an integer multiple along every axis (enforced runtime-side in ``RootMetadata.validate``).

chunk_shape.description: Physical spatial chunk size per axis (all values > 0).

cross_level_depth.description: Maximum absolute level delta for which cross-pyramid-level link arrays are materialized.  ``0`` = none (no ``+N`` or ``-N`` arrays), ``N`` = generate up to ``±N`` (or ``+N`` only when ``cross_level_storage="implicit"``), ``-1`` = all available pyramid levels.  Default ``1``.

cross_level_storage.description: Whether cross-level link arrays are written in both directions (``explicit``: ``+N`` at the finer level AND ``-N`` at the coarser level) or only positive deltas (``implicit``: only ``+N``, with ``-N`` reconstructed on read).  Default ``explicit``.

crs.description: Optional coordinate reference system metadata (free-form dict matching whatever CRS vocabulary the store uses, e.g. WKT, PROJ4, EPSG, CF conventions).

format_capabilities.description: Optional 0.3+ feature tokens advertised by this store.

geometry_types.description: One or more geometry kinds present in the store.

zv_version.description: ZV spec version this store was written against (e.g. "0.5.0"). Renamed from ``format_version`` in 0.5.0 to disambiguate from Zarr v3's ``zarr_format`` field.

RootMetadata.title: RootMetadata

dtype.description: Numpy dtype string of the array's value type (e.g. "float32").

encoding.description: How the chunk bytes are encoded.

zv_array.description: Discriminator slot identifying the kind of per-array ``.zattrs`` block.  Each writer in ``core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding token from :class:`ZvArrayTag`.

ZvArrayTag.description: Discriminator value for per-array ``.zattrs`` blocks (slot ``zv_array``).  Each writer in ``zarr_vectors/core/arrays.py`` stamps the corresponding tag.
ZvArrayTag.title: ZvArrayTag
